    <item>
        <guid>nba530685</guid>
        <title>Evan Mobley: Unstoppable in blowout victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/evan-mobley-5355</link>
        <description>Mobley recorded 21 points (7-10 FG, 1-4 3Pt, 6-11 FT), 12 rebounds, six assists, two blocks and two steals in 36 minutes during Sunday's 125-94 win over the Pistons in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 17 May 2026 9:23:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530684</guid>
        <title>Jarrett Allen: Dominates in Game 7 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jarrett-allen-4122</link>
        <description>Allen ended with 23 points (8-14 FG, 7-13 FT), seven rebounds, one assist, one block and one steal across 25 minutes during Sunday's 125-94 win over the Pistons in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 17 May 2026 9:20:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530683</guid>
        <title>Donovan Mitchell: Scores 26 in Game 7</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/donovan-mitchell-4166</link>
        <description>Mitchell posted 26 points (10-22 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 4-6 FT), eight assists, six rebounds, one steal and a block in 31 minutes during Sunday's Game 7 win over the Pistons in the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 17 May 2026 8:29:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530680</guid>
        <title>Max Strus: Starting Game 7</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/max-strus-4947</link>
        <description>Strus will start Sunday's Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals against the Pistons.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 17 May 2026 4:38:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530676</guid>
        <title>De'Aaron Fox: Iffy for Game 1</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/deaaron-fox-4116</link>
        <description>Fox (ankle) is questionable for Monday's Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals against the Thunder, Paul Garcia of ProjectSpurs.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 17 May 2026 3:29:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
